compliance_flags.flag: Radiation shielding exclusion for Rayos-X room should be explicitly stated in the client-facing proposal scope summary, not only in the SOW exclusions list
compliance_flags.proposed_resolution: Add one sentence to scope_summary noting that radiation shielding design for the Rayos-X room is excluded from standard scope and requires a specialist add-on service agreement

notes: Commercial health center project type clauses are all present in scope-of-work.json verbatim: health_authority_compliance (COFEPRIS), medical_equipment_coordination, clinical_standards, optional_supervision, esignature. IP rights are clear — architectural drawings owned by Oficio Taller until full payment, client licenses use rights, terms stated. E-signature clause valid under NOM-151-SCFI. One advisory flag on Rayos-X exclusion visibility — non-blocking.
